feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Update fields in sap b1 query generator (update command)
entry.content:
Hello

I used UPDATE query in query generator for sap business one to change items (oitm) validFor and frozenFor fields. Update query worked good but then I couldn't add item for oitm (items). How to fix it? 

 

I have written 
UPDATE OITM T0

SET T0."ValidFor" = 'Y', T0."frozenFor" = 'N'

entry.title: Query manager yellow arrow for docnum from QIPF
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a query on Query Manager, to pull DocNum from QIPF (Landed Costs).
Somehow the Yellow Arrow, when clicked always pointed to the document in the year 2017. 

So far I haven't encountered this issue for DocNum on Sales Orders or other documents.                  

 

 

 





Any clues or advice?

SAP Business One

entry.title: AUTO height details section
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using Crystal Reports to make a Sales Quotation layout.

In the DETAILS section, i have the lines of the sales quotation.

In the REPORT FOOTER section, i have subtotals, VAT, discounts...

The porblem is with the number of items per page.

I have a quotation with 57 lines.

In the report, i get HEADER, 57 lines and PAGE FOOTER in the first page, and the second page has HEADER, FOOTERS and a big blank space between both, since there are no more lines to print.

I can change the height of DETAILS saction manually, but i will get the same problem with a 40 lines sales quotation, for example.

What i want to do is make a variable field / section height depending on the number of lines.
Is it possible?

Thanks.

Victor

entry.title: i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually
entry.content: In SAP Business One, if ihave a purchase order with many items and i need to update the tax code for all or multiple line items without doing so manually for each line or using Excel

entry.title: INSTALLATION CRYSTAL REPORT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have already installed sap crystal report in my PC client after I reinstalled the crystal, I completed all the installation steps and it shows that "the installation is complete" but if I want to run the program it is not displayed anywhere in the desktop and even if in the control panel;

Any ideas?

Regards

SAP Crystal Reports SAP Business One

entry.title: SAP window frozen after lock windows
entry.content:
Hi,

Tthe SAP B1 client frozens after windows lock screen.

It doesn't even responds by clicking or right clicking on the windows task bar.

The PC uses windows 10 and SAP B1 is HANA 10 2208.

It happens with different users SAP was already removed and reinstalled.

Any ideia how to solve this ?

Thanks,
Paulo

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Invoice by ship-to
entry.content:
SAP Business One (version 10)

I have a business partner with multiple ship-to addresses. Each ship-to has it's own email address for invoicing. Is it possible to configure the BP so each invoice can go to different email addresses defined by the ship-to location?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error while generating E-Invoice
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

The customer has issued a Tax Invoice with the Bill To/Ship To Address ID as "S D CORPORATION," but in the BP Master, the Address ID is recorded as "SD CORPORATION."

Upon reviewing the BP Master change log, we did not find any irrelevant entries related to the Address ID. Could you please advise what might be the reason for this discrepancy, and how we can check if the user updated the details from the backend?

According to the BP Master log, the Address ID was updated from "S D CORPORATION" to "SD CORPORATION" at 18:34:33 on 20/09/24, while the invoice was created earlier, at 15:09:13 on the same day.

Your guidance on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Edit Crystal Report Designer in SAP Business One Client computer
entry.content:
Hi All

How to install this Crystal Report Designer on a client computer to click directly in SAP Business One Report Layout Manager Edit button? 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Which B1 localization we should select when setting up B1 in Kazakhstan?
entry.content:
Hi 

  We are trying to implement B1 roll-out project in Kazakhstan. Please advise which localization is mostly suitable for local business. 

  Thanks!

entry.title: Update Approval not trigger send re-approval when changed price or qty
entry.content:
Dear All,

I just got issue in SAP Business One 9.3 SQL on Update Approval Process not trigger when changed price or qty 

** General Setting already enabled all 
** Approval Template (Active When Update Document) 

Noted: I just got issued this month, before working fine and one more on database testing is working 

Please help how to fix it 

Thanks!

entry.title: Error connecting to Crystal Runtime; check the installation. SAPB1
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I tried to reinstall the crystal report in my PC client but it doesn't work, if I launch the crystal this error message is displayed from the start (ERROR 1) , after that I can work all normal, but if I want to import the state into SAP B1 this message is displayed and the import completes (ERROR 2); but if I see my sap state this error which is displayed in the end (ERROR 3);

And here is the overview of the control panel;

Any ideas ?

Regards.

entry.title: UI Edit Mode
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask, how can I move, work with tabs inside a document in UI Edit Mode. As you can see in the image below, the tabs got stuck and I am not able work with them. Is there any shortcut or something ? 

Thanks for any response.

entry.title: SAP Business One audit trail report
entry.content:
Our B1 users are asking for an audit trail report from B1 for local legal requirement, which can view all change logs and exactly tell the field change with old value and new value among each log instance. Does anyone create it before? If yes, possible to share the query? If not, any other work-around methods? Any ideas/thoughts, please let me know. Thanks!

SAP Business One

entry.title: Query for Prodution order nº, Receipt from Production (SI), Issue for Production(SO)
entry.content:
Hello everyone. Can you please help me to create a Query that contains the Receipt from Production (SI) and the Issue for Production (SO), for each production order?

It is also important that you can filter by date.

The objective is to classify the consumption of raw materials by business area (Distr. Rule), which we already have at the sales level, and now we want to go backwards to recover the data for 2024 at the cost level.

The ideal would be to create a table with a structure similar to this:

Prodution order nº / Receipt from Production (SI) / Issue for Production(SO)

Many thanks.

SAP Business One #SAP B1

entry.title: Which localization to use when running B1 in Kazakhstan?
entry.content:
Hi 

  We are trying to setup B1 in Kazakhstan. Please advise which localization we should select for KZ. Shall we use Russia? Ukraine or any other localization?

  Thanks!

SAP Business One

entry.title: User-defined fields order
entry.content:
We use SAP Business One 10.0.

How can I specify the display order of the user-defined fields for all users in a form?

entry.title: Format not compatible with SAP Business One 1000130; contact format provider for support
entry.content:
Dear all,

While executing Financial Reports which is provided by SAP then it is showing error like "Format not compatible with SAP Business One 1000130; contact format provider for support"

SAP Business One

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: AR INVOICE ITEM ROW TOTALFC
entry.content:
Hi All

There is no INV1.LineTotalFC though there is INV1.LineTotal?  Is it the only way is to manually calculate by INV1.Price (After Discount) x T1. Quantity to get LineTotal in Foreign BP Currency?

There are both OINV.DocTotal and OINV.DocTotalFC.

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: It is compulsory to close the Production order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

It is compulsory to close the Production order SAP Business One or not?  what happend if user cannot close the production order?

SAP Business One 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta
